issue_title: str.replaceAll is not a function on react-native (Android)
issue_body_preview: ### Describe the bug When the app is opened on Android and the user reach a screen where tanstack-form is used the app crashes because `str.replaceAll` is being called when the form is mounted. `str.replaceAll` doesn't exist without hermes enabled on React-Native
test_description_zh: 在 React Native (Android) 环境中，打开包含 TanStack Form 表单的页面，观察表单是否能正常渲染和挂载，而不会发生崩溃。
expected_result_zh: 包含 TanStack Form 的页面在 Android 设备上能正常加载和渲染表单组件，不会出现应用崩溃或 'str.replaceAll is not a function' 错误，表单各字段正常显示并可交互。
